welcome.title: Welcome to Map Corridors
welcome.body: A quick tour of how to get your photos from the map into the printable answer sheets. You can replay it anytime from the ? button.

import.title: 1. Load the route & photos
import.body: Drop a KML/GPX route and your JPG/PNG photos here (or drag them straight onto the map). Photos with GPS land on the map; photos without GPS go to the "No GPS" tray.

categorize.title: 2. Sort your photos
categorize.body: Click a photo on the map to mark it as a Track photo (blue) or a Turning-point photo (purple), or Reject it. They group in the list on the right — drag a row between groups to re-sort.

split.title: 3. Split the sets (rally)
split.body: In the photo list, use "Set 2 starts at" to pick the route turning point where the answer sheet changes to page 2. Photos at/after that TP go to Set 2, the rest to Set 1.

send.title: 4. Send to the editor
send.body: When your selection is ready, send it to Photo Helper — the sets arrive pre-filled, ready to fine-tune and export to PDF.

help.title: Replay anytime
help.body: Open this tour again whenever you need it from this ? button.

import.noCompetition: Open a competition from the launcher before importing photos
import.allDuplicates: All selected photos are already imported — skipped ({{count}}).

tray.title: No GPS ({{count}})
tray.dragHint: Drag onto the map to place

list.title: Photos
list.compareLimitTip: At most {{max}} variants can be compared at once
list.noGpsNotPlaced: No-GPS photos ({{count}}) aren't on the map yet — drag them onto the map or they won't transfer to the editor.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete photo?
deleteConfirm.body: "{{name}}" will be removed from this competition. This cannot be undone.

handoff.flushFailed: Couldn't save picks before opening the editor. Check storage and try again.
handoff.editorSyncFailed: Couldn't apply latest labels from the editor.

errors.mapboxTokenDescription: A Mapbox access token is required to display satellite imagery and map tiles.
errors.setTokenWeb: Add your token to the VITE_MAPBOX_TOKEN environment variable and restart the app.
errors.getTokenLink: Get a free token at mapbox.com →
errors.noOriginalKml: Original KML file not available for export
errors.someGroundMarkersFailed: Some ground-marker shapes could not be exported to KML and will appear as default yellow dots: {{types}}

opfs.warning: Your browser does not fully support local storage (OPFS). Changes will not persist after refresh. Consider using Chrome or Edge.
